languages.text: Платформа Тиркуаз-4, оставленная Вольным Торговцем на плаву, долгие циклы снабжала станцию Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 ресурсами, превратив планету в полноценный добывающий мир под руководством возвывисшегося артизана Декабалуса. Тем страшнее стала ее потеря, когда секта ксенаритов, захватившая власть над Тиркуазом, подняла бунт и перекрыла поставки.

Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

languages.text: プラットフォーム「ティルクアズ-4」は、ローグトレーダーによって漂流させられ、アルター・テンプルム・カリシス・エクスト-17に資源を供給し、現在では昇進した職人デカバルスが率いる鉱山惑星へと成長させた。しかし、ティルクアズを乗っ取った異星人の教団が反乱を起こし、資源供給を断ったことで、その喪失はさらに深刻なものとなった。
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

traits.locale_text: プラットフォーム・ティルクアズ-4は、ローグトレーダーによって漂流させられ、アルター・テンプルム・カリシス・エクスト-17に資源を供給し、現在では昇進した職人デカバルスが率いる鉱山惑星へと成長させた。しかし、ティルクアズを乗っ取った異星人の教団が反乱を起こし、資源供給を断ったことで、その喪失はさらに深刻なものとなった。

languages.text: 提库阿兹4号平台在行商浪人的许可下继续运转，为卡利西斯祭坛17号供应了多个周期的资源。在晋升后的匠人德卡巴洛斯的领导下，这颗行星变成了成熟的采矿世界。也正因如此，当异形科技派发动叛乱，夺取了提库阿兹的控制权并切断供给时，星站的损失尤为惨重。
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

traits.locale_text: 提库阿兹4号平台在行商浪人的许可下继续运转，为卡利西斯祭坛17号供应了多个周期的资源。在晋升后的匠人德卡巴洛斯的领导下，这颗行星变成了成熟的采矿世界。也正因如此，当异形科技派发动叛乱，夺取了提库阿兹的控制权并切断供给时，星站的损失尤为惨重。

languages.text: Restée intacte, la plateforme Tirkuaz-4 fournit des ressources à Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 de nombreux cycles durant et permit à la planète de devenir un monde minier à part entière sous la houlette de l'artisan Decabalus. La perte de la station fut d'autant plus désastreuse lorsque la secte des xénarites qui avait pris le contrôle de Tirkuaz-4 se révolta et mit un terme aux approvisionnements.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

traits.locale_text: Restée intacte, la plateforme Tirkuaz-4 fournit des ressources à Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 de nombreux cycles durant et permit à la planète de devenir un monde minier à part entière sous la houlette de l'artisan Decabalus. La perte de la station fut d'autant plus désastreuse lorsque la secte des xénarites qui avait pris le contrôle de Tirkuaz-4 se révolta et mit un terme aux approvisionnements.

languages.text: La plataforma Tirkuaz-4, a flote por decisión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, suministró a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 durante muchos ciclos, convirtiendo así al planeta en un mundo minero completo bajo el liderazgo del artesano ascendido Decabalus. La pérdida de la estación fue aún más dolorosa cuando la secta xenarita que había tomado el control de Tirkuaz se rebeló y cortó el flujo de suministros.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

traits.locale_text: La plataforma Tirkuaz-4, a flote por decisión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, suministró a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 durante muchos ciclos, convirtiendo así al planeta en un mundo minero completo bajo el liderazgo del artesano ascendido Decabalus. La pérdida de la estación fue aún más dolorosa cuando la secta xenarita que había tomado el control de Tirkuaz se rebeló y cortó el flujo de suministros.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in su üzerinde bıraktığı Platform Tirkuaz-4, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye birçok döngü boyunca kaynak sağladı ve yükselmiş Zanaatkâr Decabalus'un liderliğinde gezegeni tam teşekküllü bir maden dünyasına dönüştürdü. Tirkuaz'ın kontrolünü ele geçiren zenarit tarikatı isyan edip ikmali kestiğinde istasyonun kaybı çok daha üzücü oldu.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'in su üzerinde bıraktığı Platform Tirkuaz-4, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye birçok döngü boyunca kaynak sağladı ve yükselmiş Zanaatkâr Decabalus'un liderliğinde gezegeni tam teşekküllü bir maden dünyasına dönüştürdü. Tirkuaz'ın kontrolünü ele geçiren zenarit tarikatı isyan edip ikmali kestiğinde istasyonun kaybı çok daha üzücü oldu.

languages.text: Die {mf|vom Freihändler|von der Freihändlerin} verschonte Plattform Tirkuaz-4 versorgte Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 viele Zyklen lang mit Ressourcen und verwandelte den Planeten in eine vollwertige Bergbauwelt unter der Leitung des nun erhabenen Artifex Decabalus. Der Verlust der Station wog umso schwerer, als die Sekte der Xenariten, die Tirkuaz kontrollierten, revoltierte und den Nachschub abschnitt.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, left afloat by the Rogue Trader, supplied Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 with resources for many cycles, turning the planet into a full-fledged mining world under the leadership of now elevated Artisan Decabalus. The loss of the station was all the more grievous when the xenarite sect that had seized control of Tirkuaz revolted and cut off supplies.
